{{CargoClone
|name=Spiderguy
|rank=orange
|cabin=2
|id=126
|gene1={race} ATK +50
|gene2={race} ART +50
|gene3=Per 10% HP lost, {race} ATK +60
|gene4=Per 60 Zombie Minions in battle,
Troop Fire DMG +6
|gene5=Fire DMG +0.9%
|gene6=Per 60 Zombie Minions in battle,
Troop Fire DMG +10
|gene7=Fire DMG +1.5%
|}}
